extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate “against our Company” and “by our Company” sections: I counted the against rows only—criminal Nil (0), tax 2, statutory/regulatory actions Nil (0), and other material litigation 1 with Nil amount—and excluded the by-Company rows (criminal 1 and tax 1). The quantified aggregate against the Company is the stated against-section total of ₹26,547.13 million, comprising ₹26,547.13 million of tax proceedings and Nil for other material litigation; no subsidiary litigation is disclosed. The contingent-liabilities disclosures are as of September 30, 2020, but no stated Total row is provided, so line items were not summed. The 99.75% concentration figure is for Fiscal 2020 and represents lease income, interest on loans and pre-commencement lease interest as a percentage of total revenue from operations; it is not a top-five or top-ten customer concentration figure and therefore is not used. The source monetary unit is ₹ million; ₹26,547.13 million ÷ 10 = ₹2,654.713 crore.
